creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
At Fri, 26 Jan 2001 20:24:17 -0800 (PST),
daichi@ongs.gr.jp wrote:
> >Description:
> The checksum of /usr/ports/mail/yuzu is not correct. Please fix it.

Not correct?  That's weird.  The value is exactly what you submitted
and has never been changed since the initial import.

Hmm, I can't believe it was wrong in the first place, as I must have
tested it before importing..

> -MD5 (yuzu-1.0.tar.gz) = d4bfcb85a277133ac77b393af9bd3820
> +MD5 (yuzu-1.0.tar.gz) = 68abcec2a45f01b851895f3318cdd712

If you've done a repack, would you provide me what's changed?
